title: PhonesCraft
description: A mod that adds realistic phones and electronics to Minecraft. They're for decoration purposes.
body:
Welcome to PhonesCraft Mod!

 

-This is a mod that will add over 100+ devices for example (iPhone 16 Pro, Nokia 3310, iPad Pro, Controllers, Samsung Galaxy S25 and Z Flip 6 and Fold 6, Nintendo Switch, Google Pixel 9 Pro, And 100+ more) with realistic textures. And with more updates we will continue to add even more devices so enjoy!

 

-This Mod is Created For Only Decoration and For Those Who Roleplay or Record Minecraft Animations and Movies (Like Acting Using a Phone or Device), And Who Make Electronic Shops in Their Worlds (Apple Store, Samsung Store) and etc.

 

-If you have any feature requests or notice any bug, please submit them.

 

-For Video Demonstration or Review: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SElWoSG0AKU

 

-To donate me by PayPal: https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=UVQYWFLKQMSKW
